string.text: Excellent, we did it. You shoot pretty well. Of course, it’s clear you're recovering from, hmm, a concussion, but it's no big deal. I'll carve out what’s needed from this carcass, and then we’ll head back to the base. When we return, come by for your reward.

Good, we did it. Honestly, your shooting wasn’t great. It’s clear you’re recovering from, hmm, a concussion, but it’s no big deal, it will pass. I’ll carve out what’s needed from this carcass, and then we’ll head back to the base. When we return, come by for your reward.
I’m ready for the hunt. Shall we go?
No, my friend, not now. By six in the morning...
Hey, Leshy. How are you feeling?
Great. By the way, I’m Moskito, a local hunter. I gather food for the guys, train the youth. You get the idea.
Nice to meet you. Borland has already told me a bit about you. He says you’re going to take me on a “walk”..

That’s right. Fresh air is good for your health, haha. We’ll go hunting. Lately, there’s been a problem with food at the base, and Rat, that bastard, isn’t doing anything - his shipment is, apparently, delayed. I was talking to Borland recently, and it’s time to remember the taste of fresh Chernobyl meat. As they say, no luxury, just trying to survive. My buddies left two days ago for the right bank, and it’s not safe to go after boars alone without cover. You may be new here, but a fisherman senses another fisherman from a distance. Experience is hard to beat, it’s not something you can drink away.. And you, to be honest, are no rookie, even if you don’t show it. If you join me, we’ll split the loot. It won’t be much, but you could use every penny now.

Why not? But there’s one problem. I haven’t hunted mutants before, I don’t have that kind of experience. Sure, I’ve killed, but only to survive. I’m not really skilled at field dressing carcasses either.

What’s the problem? Just watch me - you’ll figure it all out as we go. If we get game, I’ll show you how to field dress. It’s a meticulous job, but not hard. We’re not in a slaughterhouse here, it’s simpler - just cut out the bigger, tastier pieces and leave the rest. The locals will clean up the rest, like a vacuum cleaner. We leave early in the morning, the boar usually wakes up around eight. So, be ready by six. Keep in mind, if you miss the time, we’ll have to postpone to the next day. We’ll lose money, and we’ll get less. So, don’t be late.
Agreed. Six o’clock, then. See you.
You mentioned a reward for the hunt...

Of course, here’s your reward for the hunt... I’ll even add a bit more for your courage. And if you want to learn the ins and outs of hunting mutants, just say so, I’ll teach you. Trust me, you’ll find it useful!
Of course, here’s your reward for the hunt... And if you want to learn the ins and outs of hunting mutants, just say so, I’ll teach you. Trust me, you’ll find it useful!
Hey, Leshy. How are you feeling?
It’ll be a nice walk, heh heh.

Excellent, we did it. You shoot pretty well. Of course, it’s clear you're recovering from, hmm, a concussion, but it's no big deal. I’ll carve out what’s needed from this carcass, and then we’ll head back to the base. When we return, come by for your reward.

Good, we did it. Honestly, your shooting wasn’t great. It’s clear you’re recovering from, hmm, a concussion, but it’s no big deal, it will pass. I’ll carve out what’s needed from this carcass, and then we’ll head back to the base. When we return, come by for your reward.
Great. By the way, I’m Moskito, a local hunter. I gather food for the guys, train the youth. You get the idea.
Nice to meet you. Borland has already told me a bit about you. He says you’re going to take me on a “walk”..

That’s right. Fresh air is good for your health, haha. We’ll go hunting. Lately, there’s been a problem with food at the base, and Rat, that bastard, isn’t doing anything - his shipment is, apparently, delayed. I was talking to Borland recently, and it’s time to remember the taste of fresh Chernobyl meat. As they say, no luxury, just trying to survive. My buddies left two days ago for the right bank, and it’s not safe to go after boars alone without cover. You may be new here, but a fisherman senses another fisherman from a distance. Experience is hard to beat, it’s not something you can drink away.. And you, to be honest, are no rookie, even if you don’t show it. If you join me, we’ll split the loot. It won’t be much, but you could use every penny now.

Why not? But there’s one problem. I haven’t hunted mutants before, I don’t have that kind of experience. Sure, I’ve killed, but only to survive. I’m not really skilled at field dressing carcasses either.

What’s the problem? Just watch me - you’ll figure it all out as we go. If we get game, I’ll show you how to field dress. It’s a meticulous job, but not hard. We’re not in a slaughterhouse here, it’s simpler - just cut out the bigger, tastier pieces and leave the rest. The locals will clean up the rest, like a vacuum cleaner. We leave early in the morning, the boar usually wakes up around eight. So, be ready by six. Keep in mind, if you miss the time, we’ll have to postpone to the next day. We’ll lose money, and we’ll get less. So, don’t be late.
Agreed. Six o'clock, then. See you.
Hello. Need help with repairs? Or are you here for an upgrade?
(phrases about the main character being a jerk)
Hello. I brought you the ammunition for the checkpoint.
Hello, buddy. How's your trip going?
I have a couple of questions...

Well, let's start with the fact that I used to be military. I began my service in the Zone shortly before the 3rd catastrophe. During one of the operations, there were problems with evacuation, so the remaining members of our company had to make their own way out. Well, after that, we were all discharged. Everything was fine, but they declared us deserters and revoked our military pensions for service in the Zone. I thought to myself... I decided to return to the Zone, knowing some loopholes. Naturally, I came back as a stalker. And thus, the name Goblin.
You mentioned something about an energy artifact...

Exactly, listen. Our bunker needs an alternative energy source. One option is to use powerful electro-artifacts. The guys say they recently saw one in the "Tesla" area. According to them, it's some kind of... Go fetch the artifact, please...
Got it, I'm on my way.
